summary: FOMC held benchmark rate at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026. Historic 8-4 dissent — most divided since October 1992. Inflation elevated partly from energy prices. Powell indicated he will stay on Board of Governors when chairmanship ends; Kevin Warsh moving toward confirmation as next chair.
